query: Find 10 buildings in Trondheim municipality that intersect quick-clay hazard areas with high risk class and are closest to the municipality centroid, sorted by shortest distance first.

1.description: get Trondheim municipality geometry and centroid

2.description: inspect quick-clay risk class lookup values

3.description: retrieve quick-clay hazard polygons for the identified high-risk class limited to Trondheim extent

4.description: get buildings in Trondheim (filter by kommunenummer)

5.description: find buildings that intersect the high-risk quick-clay polygons

6.description: compute distance from each intersecting building to the municipality centroid

7.description: collapse to one row per building taking the minimum distance

10.description: return building id and distance for the top 10
